title: Portable Personal Agent Chat OS
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Clean-room, Emperor Agent-inspired personal agent chatbot OS with streaming chat, provider routing, tools, skills, MCP, memory, subagents, and token telemetry.
plainDescription: A validated mapped-project blueprint for building a self-hosted personal AI assistant that behaves like a small chatbot operating system: chat UI, model router, tool dispatcher, skill registry, MCP adapter, memory, delegation, usage telemetry, and a fresh Mapper OS flow eval.
promise: A validated mapped-project Buildprint for rebuilding a portable personal agent chatbot OS without copying Emperor Agent source or claiming exact clone/provider/tool parity.
whatYouNeed: Nothing for local deterministic proof mode
Provider keys only for optional live model adapters
MCP servers only if you want real external tools
risks: Overclaiming full Emperor Agent clone parity
checks: Clean-room mapped-project scope; not a full Emperor Agent clone
Offline TypeScript proof builds without live providers or network calls
Tool policy denies shell by default
Skill selection and subagent delegation are traceable events
MCP fake tool maps through same ToolSpec boundary
Memory compacts under context pressure while retaining recent messages
Token telemetry is emitted and asserted
Mapper OS personal-agent flow eval passed: map judge 91/100, deterministic checks passed, Codex replay passed, outcome judge 82/100; verdict ship-with-notes.

trustBadges.label: Mapped from a real small OS chatbot
trustBadges.detail: Primary architecture source is TheSyart/emperor-agent, with JARVIS/ToFu used only as comparison pressure.

trustBadges.label: Mapper flow eval passed
trustBadges.detail: Fresh Mapper OS eval against emperor-agent plus ToFu/JARVIS comparison pressure passed with map judge 91/100 and outcome judge 82/100 (ship-with-notes).

trustBadges.label: Offline proof
trustBadges.detail: Deterministic TypeScript proof validates runtime contracts without live model, MCP, shell, or network calls.

trustBadges.label: Safety-gated tools
trustBadges.detail: Shell/network/write risk is explicit; dangerous tools are denied unless policy allows them.

trustBadges.label: Explicit parity boundary
trustBadges.detail: Claims stop at clean-room workflow/contract/mock-runtime proof unless upgraded with live evidence.

copyPrompt: Use the Portable Personal Agent Chat OS Buildprint. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-personal-agent-chat-os/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-personal-agent-chat-os/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. Build a clean-room personal agent chatbot OS with streaming chat, provider routing, tools, skills, MCP adapter, memory/compaction, subagent delegation, token telemetry, and safety-gated tool policy. Use fake providers/tools by default. Do not claim Emperor Agent clone, exact UI parity, live provider parity, shell parity, or real MCP parity unless separately validated.

publicStatus.label: Mapper eval passed
publicStatus.explanation: Personal-agent Mapper OS flow passed deterministic checks, Codex replay, map judge 91/100, and outcome judge 82/100; verdict ship-with-notes.
